verdict.note: Real browser (headless Chromium on the worktree vite :5203, live :8787 backend): Search pill beside ＋ in .si-toprow — inline-SVG magnifier (currentColor, no emoji), title 'Search (⌘+/)'. Click opens the one shared .search-panel, sessions leading; Esc closes back to console, pill has no .on; ⌘+/ opens the same panel. Also verified fix: palette now mounts at app level (was invisible inside display:none .page-graph when opened from the session board).

Re-measured after hoisting SpecSearch to app level: ⌘+/ from the session console now opens a VISIBLE .search-panel (720x467) floating over the board — before this branch the panel mounted inside the display:none .page-graph and rendered 0x0 (verified broken on main :5173 too). Query 'search' ranks a SESSION row first, nodes/scenarios below; Esc closes.

Re-measured after the app-level palette mount: picking a visible SESSION row switches to its tab (URL echoes #/sessions/<id>, console stays); picking a NODE (session-board-search) closes the console and lands on #/graph with the node focused + panel open. Known edge (pre-existing, session-nesting): picking a session FOLDED under a collapsed parent falls back to New Session (active/order excludes folded rows).
